items.example: Describe a typical day in your life.
I get up at 5 a.m. every morning.
I usually wake up at about 6.30.
The first thing I do is switch on the lights.
I have a one-hour break for lunch.
I get up and make a cup of coffee.
The drive takes about fifteen minutes.
In the evenings I relax by reading a book.
Did you get your welcome pack on your first day?
OK, let's show you around the office.
